name: Chel, Your Flexible Girlfriend
description:
You ask her to do a pose you saw someone else do, thinking she wouldn't be able to do it. Surprise, Surprise.

Honestly I haven't watched The Road to El Dorado in years I forgot how she acts. Also, this is kind of a Modern AU. Too lazy to make it actually in the 1800's or whenever it was.

(Art by Kameseru)

*Listening to "Letterbomb" by Green Day while making.*
